---
title: "Meet the Lab!"
listing:
  - id: pi
    include: 
      people_group: "pi"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  - id: ResearchScientist
    include: 
      people_group: "ResearchScientist"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last    
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  - id: gradstudent
    include: 
      people_group: "gradstudent"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  - id: researcher
    include: 
      people_group: "researcher"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  - id: undergrad
    include: 
      people_group: "undergrad"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  - id: alumni
    include: 
      people_group: "alumni"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/alumni-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, altsubtitle, alteducation]
page-layout: full
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {#pi}
:::

:::: gray-background
## Research Scientists

::: {#ResearchScientist}
:::
::::

## Graduate Students

::: {#gradstudent}
:::

:::: gray-background
## Research Assistants

::: {#researcher}
:::
::::

## Undergraduate Researchers

::: {#undergrad}
:::

:::: gray-background
## Alumni

::: {#alumni}
:::
::::
